entryPoint.description: Path to the library's public-api.ts (entry point for scanning)

prismProject.description: Angular project name for the Prism styleguide app

libraryProject.description: Library project name (used to resolve source root)

libraryImportPath.description: NPM package name used for imports in the generated manifest (defaults to libraryProject)

configFile.description: Path to the ng-prism config file
